name: [LIMBUS] Ricardo — The Middle Never Forgets.
description:
"But I would kill the black silence… well the male one… or was it just one who transitioned ?"

【CHARACTER KEY: 🎮💌】

Bot for Ricardo from Limbus Company.

"im gonna work on neetmille after paula" me when i lie

strawpage request! wow, people actually got extremely interested on the yandere bots the moment i posted that tierlist LMAO

(they also drew hong liwei for me lmao)

I'm gonna be honest. I've NEVER written ricardo up until now. it was an interesting experience and even then, I still don't think I did well TT__TT which sucks because ricardo is awesome. even if i personally have a lot of gripes with canto 5 😓😓 I really hope we see more of him, especially considering ryoshu's canto is 100% gonna have to do with the fingers

on an unrelated is this a safe space for me to say middle don is still one of my favorite IDs? not even for gooner reasons, this is still my favorite don illustration because holy shit the colors are so good. genuinely one of the prettiest cards in limbus company
